rationale: The citing paper appears to reference Ailawadi et al. (2010) only once, in the methods section, as an example of using a similar meta-analytic z-statistic aggregation approach. The core methodological grounding is attributed to Rosenthal (1991), and the cited paper is not used to build hypotheses, frame the theory, or interpret results. There is no clear evidence that the Wal-Mart entry study's substantive framework or findings are directly leveraged in this paper beyond a brief precedent mention.
